title: Dan
content:
Dan
Well?!

Hunter
Antonio was puking up furballs at my dad’s place last night.

Dan
And?

Hunter
My dad asked me to clean it up.

Enrique
And?!

Hunter
There were piles all over my sister’s bedroom floor.

Mark
And?

Hunter
When I was in the bathroom—

Dan
Wrap it up!

Hunter
I think my dad is sick.

Dan
Great. So now I think you are sick.

Enrique
Well, I think you’re sick! (To Mark)

Hunter
(to himself really)
I don’t think I’m sick. I don’t feel sick.

Dan
It doesn’t matter if you feel sick or not. You can show no signs and still, STILL—

Dan coughs loudly.

Everyone flips sides, Dan is now the odd man out all alone on his own side.
